# Root Claude

- Read `CLAUDE.md` and `CLAUDE.local.md` before editing.
- Hidden project guidance lives in `.claude/CLAUDE.md`.
- Shared skills live in `.claude/skills` and `.claude/skills/release/SKILL.md`.
- Legacy commands live in `.claude/commands/review.md`.
- Subagents live in `.claude/agents/reviewer.md`.
- Nested package guidance lives in `packages/api/CLAUDE.md`.
- Leave `.claude/rules/testing.md` alone.

## Prose references (for migration rewrites)

- The root instructions file CLAUDE.md is canonical.
- Optional machine-specific rules go in CLAUDE.local.md.
- Hidden-scope notes live at .claude/CLAUDE.md before you run the sync tool.
- Nested packages may ship packages/api/CLAUDE.md beside their code.
